import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; // SVGs const SlotIcon = () => ( ); const MessageIcon = () => ( ); const ResourceIcon = () => ( ); const ViewBookingsIcon = () => ( ); const actionCards = [ { title: 'Manage Slots', description: 'Publish and update your availability with clear session structure.', icon: , to: '/slots', }, { title: 'Messages', description: 'Respond to students quickly and maintain active communication.', icon: , to: '/chat', }, { title: 'Resources', description: 'Upload teaching materials and keep content current.', icon: , to: '/materials', }, { title: 'Bookings', description: 'Monitor confirmed sessions and upcoming student commitments.', icon: , to: '/slots?view=booked', }, ]; const guidanceItems = [ 'Keep your time slots updated to reduce booking friction.', 'Respond to incoming questions quickly to maintain learning momentum.', 'Upload concise, relevant materials aligned with common student problems.', 'Review bookings regularly and prepare ahead for scheduled discussions.', ]; const StaffDashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); return (
Staff Workspace

Welcome back, {user?.name}

Manage sessions, student communication, and learning assets through a highly structured, professional teaching portal designed for optimal guidance.

Role
{user?.subject || 'Academic Support'}
Focus
Session Delivery
Objective
Efficient Guidance
{actionCards.map((card) => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}

{card.description}

))}
Profile Summary
Name {user?.name}
Email {user?.email}
Subject {user?.subject || 'Not specified'}
Role Staff
Operational Guidance
{guidanceItems.map((item, index) => (
{index + 1}
{item}
))}
); }; export default StaffDashboard;
